summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. Three security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling. One listed PR is already closed. The remaining open non-security PRs are preserved for maintainer review or independent follow-up; no close, merge, label, comment, or fix PR action is planned.

actions.reason: Access-control and session-visibility boundary changes require central OpenClaw security handling, not ProjectClownfish cleanup.
This is security scanner work involving injection threat detection, so it belongs in central security handling.
Encrypted backup/restore code with reported traversal and sensitive-state handling concerns is out of scope for ProjectClownfish mutation.

Already closed; no closure or mutation is valid.
Standalone maintainer-owned PR; preserve for normal review because close and merge actions are not justified in this plan shard.
Related focused fix for the #84022 family, but it is not a duplicate/superseded cleanup target and merge is blocked by job policy.
